questions.question: Describe the process by which light is focused onto a sensor to create a photometric image. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of lenses, sensors, and light in image formation

questions.question: What is the primary function of the lens in an imaging system? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the lens's role in focusing light onto the sensor

questions.question: Explain the difference between a pinhole camera and a lens-based camera. How does this difference affect image formation? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the principles of image formation in both types of cameras
